description_long: This is a modern wristwatch with a bold, sporty design, featuring a predominantly black case and strap accented by striking yellow highlights. The watch face is intricate, with visible mechanical elements and a multi-layered dial, suggesting a skeleton or chronograph style. The strap appears to be made of a flexible material, possibly rubber or silicone, with yellow stitching or inlays running along its length. The bezel is robust and angular, complementing the overall rugged aesthetic, and the watch is mounted on a circular, high-tech display stand with matching black and yellow motifs. The dial includes multiple subdials and detailed markers, enhancing its technical appearance. No visible brand logo is present, but the design is visually distinctive and likely intended for urban, active use.
description: A sporty, black wristwatch with yellow accents, a complex skeleton-style dial, and a robust rubber strap, displayed on a matching circular stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed skeleton dial, yellow accents, and the full face of the watch with its technical features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the curvature of the strap, and the layered construction of the watch.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the strap and the case, with less detail visible on the dial.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the strap's flexibility and the side profile of the case and bezel.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features a skeleton design with visible mechanical elements, multiple subdials, and bold yellow markers. The layout is technical and layered, with a sporty, chronograph-inspired aesthetic and no numerals, focusing on indices and decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Rubber or silicone strap with yellow stitching or inlays, flexible and robust, designed for comfort and durability.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands and multiple subdials, featuring luminous elements and a complex, open-worked dial.
